_comment: Copy to config.local.json (same folder) and fill in values. config.local.json is gitignored.

deploy._comment: Set when -Deploy is passed. remoteName is the git remote that owns gh-pages (usually 'origin'). branchName must be 'gh-pages' for GitHub Pages default config.

serve._comment: Used when -Serve is passed. Defaults to npx serve on the given port.
